steps: Go to https://dashboard.nylas.com and log in or sign up for a free account
On the 'All apps' page, click 'Create new app'
Enter an app name and select your data residency region (US or EU)
In the left sidebar, expand the application menu and go to 'API Keys'
Enter a name and optional expiration date for the key
Copy the API key secret immediately — it is only shown once

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Key
credential_fields.description: Your Nylas application API key, used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available with limited API calls per month
The API key secret is shown only once — store it securely
EU data residency users should use https://api.eu.nylas.com as the base URL
You need to create grants (OAuth connections to email/calendar providers) separately
Nylas v3 API keys start with 'nyk_v0_'

test_endpoint.description: List all grants (authenticated user connections) to verify the API key
